scripts.shared:build: pnpm --filter @proliferate/design build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/product-domain build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/ui build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/product-ui build
scripts.shared:typecheck: pnpm --filter @proliferate/design typecheck && pnpm --filter @proliferate/product-domain typecheck && pnpm --filter @proliferate/ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @proliferate/ui build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/product-ui typecheck
scripts.web:typecheck: pnpm --filter @proliferate/cloud-sdk build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/cloud-sdk-react build && pnpm shared:build && pnpm --filter @proliferate/web typecheck
